component.name: HoverCard
component.description: Show a rich content preview on hover.

useCases: User profile previews on avatar or username hover
Quick-view cards for entities (repos, projects, contacts)
Supplementary detail without leaving the page

commonPatterns.name: user-preview
commonPatterns.description: Show user details when hovering over a username
commonPatterns.composition:
@username
UN

Username

Bio text

commonPatterns.name: link-preview
commonPatterns.description: Show a page summary when hovering over a link
commonPatterns.composition:
Documentation

API reference and guides for the platform.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using HoverCard for critical actions or required information
antiPatterns.reason: Hover is not available on touch devices; content would be inaccessible
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Popover or Dialog for content that must be accessible on all devices

antiPatterns.scenario: Putting interactive forms or buttons inside HoverCardContent
antiPatterns.reason: The card dismisses on mouse leave, making interactions unreliable
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Popover for content that requires user interaction

antiPatterns.scenario: Using HoverCard as a tooltip replacement
antiPatterns.reason: HoverCard is for rich content previews; tooltips are for short text hints
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Tooltip for simple text labels

slots.HoverCardTrigger: Element that activates the hover card on mouse enter
slots.HoverCardContent: The popover content shown on hover

composition.asChild: HoverCardTrigger supports asChild to render as a custom element

interactions.hover: Content appears on mouse enter after optional delay, hides on mouse leave
interactions.focus: Content appears on trigger focus for keyboard accessibility

responsive.mobile: Not triggered by hover — consider touch alternatives
responsive.desktop: Appears near the trigger, respects viewport boundaries

accessibility.role: Radix manages aria attributes on trigger and content
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Focus on trigger opens the card; Escape closes it
accessibility.screenReader: Content is announced when the card opens
accessibility.focusManagement: Content is rendered in a portal; focus returns to trigger on close

rules: Only use for supplementary, non-essential content
Do not rely on HoverCard for information required on mobile/touch devices
Keep HoverCardContent read-only — no interactive elements inside
Default align is center with sideOffset of 4px

aiHints.context: Use for rich content previews on hover (user profiles, link summaries). Not for critical content (inaccessible on touch). For simple text hints use Tooltip; for interactive content use Popover.
